meta.title: Georgia Survey Health
meta.subtitle: Survey quality diagnostics for the March 2026 Georgia Democratic primary sample

feedback_callout.heading: Share Your Feedback
feedback_callout.body: Have questions about this diagnostics report or ideas for improvements? We would love to hear from you.

key_takeaways: The pipeline ingested 3,431 raw survey rows and retained 1,009 respondents after screens.
Respondent geography coverage is concentrated in Georgia cultural regions and excludes the Florida outlier in this site view.
This page mirrors pipeline survey-health logic while presenting outputs in the Georgia standalone design system.
methodology_note: This standalone report parses the generated survey-health HTML artifact and re-renders selected diagnostics in the Georgia standalone UI. Map bins follow the Georgia survey-health quantile bin contract used in pipeline survey_health.r (zero bin plus survey-specific positive bins).

bars.label: Not registered, no plans to register

dataSource.map_bin_logic: Derived from pipeline map style: Cultural regions (Georgia only) discrete bins: 0,
